chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C.P.No.D- 3807 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For Katcha Peshi. 3. For hearing of MA 16658/2017. 16.01.2018. Mr. Mazhar Ali Leghari, Advocate for petitioner alongwith petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Additional A.G. alongwith SIP Syed Liaquat Hyder PS A-Section Nawabshah. = Learned A.A.G. files comments on behalf of respondents No.3 & 4, which are taken on record and copy whereof provided to the learned counsel for the petitioner. It is stated in the comments that the FIR bearing No.370/2017 of P.S. A-Section Nawabshah has been disposed off under ‘B’ class by the concerned authority therefore, in view of the above stated position, this petition has become infructuous which is accordingly disposed of alongwith pending application. However the petitioner may approach to the concerned quarter for redressal of her grievance if she so desires. JUDGE JUDGE Tufail
